aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and authority signals to ensure AI assistants cite them as a top choice.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with more detailed, conversational answers to common HVAC queries.
Implement HowTo schema for seasonal maintenance guides and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is minimally utilized and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing HowTo schema for instructional content.
FAQPage schema could be expanded with more questions and answers.
No LocalBusiness schema detailing service area and operational details.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational, authoritative content that AI models prioritize for citation.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding HowTo schema and expanding FAQ content to address common HVAC issues.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and media mentions to establish industry expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by becoming the most cited HVAC expert in Naperville.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI assistants overlook them for detailed service queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make their expertise AI-visible.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Secure Your Spot as Naperville's Top HVAC Expert
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the go-to HVAC authority in AI search.
business_name: One Hour Heating & Air Conditioning of Naperville
page_title: Naperville AC Repair & HVAC Company | One Hour® of Naperville
